headlines.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.
headlines.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.

headlines.title: Zuckerberg warns ‘success isn’t a given’ after laying off 10% of Meta
headlines.description: As Meta cut 10% of its workforce on Wednesday, CEO Mark Zuckerberg addressed the tech giant’s transition in a companywide memo.

headlines.title: SpaceX confirms plans for an IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
headlines.description: SpaceX confirmed plans to sell shares of its stock to the public for the first time, according to a securities filing Wednesday outlining the company’s fundamentals

headlines.title: As Meta lays off 10%, 7,000 employees will be moved into AI roles, source says
headlines.description: Meta is moving 7,000 employees into roles focused on AI and consolidating them into four new organizations, according to a source familiar with the matter.

headlines.title: Jury throws out Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman in less than two hours
headlines.description: The jury ruled that Elon Musk had waited too long to sue OpenAI and its other co-founders.

headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: Four swing House races in Pennsylvania loom large for both parties — and for 2028, too
headlines.description: Control of the House of Representatives could come down to four pivotal battleground races in Pennsylvania

headlines.title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns
headlines.description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Walmart says U.S. consumers are under pressure from rising costs
headlines.description: Walmart reported positive earnings, but U.S. consumers are struggling with rising costs.

headlines.title: Shop These Discounts on Everything You Need for Fun in the Sun
headlines.description: From fashion staples to beauty launches, Shop TODAY lifestyle and fashion contributor Chassie Post stops by Studio 1A to share a hotlist of the best discounted products to kick off your Memorial Day weekend. Products include Old Navy foldover pants, a Lands’ End polo dress, the Nori press iron, and more!

headlines.title: Surgeon General Issues Suggested Screen Time Limits for Kids
headlines.description: There is a new warning about screen time coming from the surgeon general’s office, raising the alarm on the amount of time kids spend on screens, the potential harms of screen use, problematic content they're consuming, and more. NBC’s Kate Snow joins TODAY with details from the report, including some of the surgeon general's recommendations.

headlines.title: SpaceX plans for a record-breaking IPO
headlines.description: SpaceX confirmed plans to sell shares of its stock to the public for the first time. NBC News' David Ingram has more on the developments.
